name: current-2026-scoutgate
description: Full 2026 replay testing coverage-aware scout-gated features after live Firebase import. ScoutGate keeps sparse scout observations from entering linear residual learning at full strength, while preserving the existing RoleV3/TailGuard baselines for direct comparison.

notes: This is a feature-risk test: if ScoutGate wins only where scout coverage is dense but fails on broad 2026 replay, it should stay rejected.
Gate E2/S6 means event-scout evidence reaches confidence faster than season-wide scout evidence, but no current-match observation is visible before prediction.
